problem id: a59e2ff7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  01011010 -> 11011011
  11001011 -> 01011111
  10100011 -> 00011101
  10010101 -> 10111110
  11111011 -> 11011111
  01111100 -> 11101111
  10100110 -> 00110101
  11000000 -> 00011110
  10001111 -> 01111101

query: 11001001
predicted answer: 01011111
